name: kakaotalk
title: KakaoTalk
description: Open saved KakaoTalk chats and send messages through the native macOS app.
author: winnercup1602

commands.name: open-chat
commands.title: Open Chat
commands.subtitle: KakaoTalk
commands.description: Search saved KakaoTalk chats and open them in the native macOS app.

commands.name: add-chat
commands.title: Add Chat
commands.subtitle: KakaoTalk
commands.description: Save a KakaoTalk chat so it can be opened or messaged from Raycast.

commands.name: import-chats
commands.title: Import Chats
commands.subtitle: KakaoTalk
commands.description: Import recent KakaoTalk chats from the native macOS app.

commands.name: send-message
commands.title: Send Message
commands.subtitle: KakaoTalk
commands.description: Send a message to a saved KakaoTalk chat through the native macOS app.

commands.name: open-quiet-chats
commands.title: Open Quiet Chats
commands.subtitle: KakaoTalk
commands.description: Open KakaoTalk's Quiet Chats folder in the native macOS app.

commands.name: open-kakaotalk
commands.title: Open KakaoTalk
commands.subtitle: KakaoTalk
commands.description: Open or activate the native KakaoTalk app.

tools.name: open-chat
tools.title: Open KakaoTalk Chat
tools.description: Opens a saved KakaoTalk chat in the native macOS app. Use only when the user explicitly asks to open a chat.

tools.name: send-message
tools.title: Send KakaoTalk Message
tools.description: Sends a message to a saved KakaoTalk chat using local UI automation. Always confirm the recipient and message with the user before sending.

preferences.name: confirmBeforeSend
preferences.title: Confirm Before Sending
preferences.label: Ask before sending messages from commands
preferences.description: When enabled, Raycast asks for confirmation before command-based message sending. AI tools always request confirmation.

preferences.name: closeChatWindowAfterSend
preferences.title: Close Chat Window
preferences.label: Close the chat window after sending
preferences.description: Close the active KakaoTalk chat window after a message is sent.

preferences.name: automationDelayMs
preferences.title: Automation Delay
preferences.description: Delay in milliseconds between KakaoTalk UI automation steps. Increase this if your Mac opens chats slowly.

preferences.name: importChatLimit
preferences.title: Import Chat Limit
preferences.description: Maximum number of recent KakaoTalk chats to import from the chat list.

scripts.prepublishOnly:
echo "

It seems like you are trying to publish the Raycast extension to npm.

If you wanted to publish it to the Raycast Store, use \`npm run publish\` instead.

" && exit 1
